title: DiamondFire Client
description: A client that aims to improve the coding and playing experience on the DiamondFire Server.
body:
# DiamondFire Client
An unofficial client with everything you need to play on the **[DiamondFire](https://mcdiamondfire.com/)** server. Includes the **[Code Client](https://modrinth.com/mod/codeclient)** mod, some quality of life mods, and optimization mods, which improve the DiamondFire experience. The pack also includes a shader optimized for the best possible DiamondFire experience.
### Build for DiamondFire:
Thanks to **Code Client**, DiamondFire's in-world coding system is easier than ever to use. With features like stylized text previews, chest syntax suggestions, quick value creation, and easier codespace navigation, it's hard to go back.

Diamond Fire Client also includes optimization mods like Enchanced Block Entities, which especially improve performance on DiamondFire, where hundreds of chests are loaded at a time in the codespace.

Creating flavorful text is also easier than ever, thanks to the Symbol Chat mod providing easy access to Unicode characters and convenient font typing.
